claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: Localized page-number and cursor navigation with real links, current state, named ellipses, safe URLs, and server-owned callbacks.
semantics: A named nav contains a list of real links and exactly one localized aria-current page or cursor label.
Unavailable previous and next destinations render noninteractive aria-disabled text rather than anchors with disabled styling.
Page ranges validate finite integer bounds and expose named ellipses; cursor mode accepts independent previous and next destinations.
Provider keys pagination.label, pagination.previous, pagination.next, pagination.ellipsis, pagination.page, and pagination.currentPage localize copy and numbers; explicit props win.

preferences.forcedColors: Native links, current border, disabled text, and system focus remain distinguishable.
preferences.reducedMotion: No navigation state depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical layout mirrors and bdi isolates localized page labels.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Navigation wraps without clipping a link, label, or focus indicator.
